description: User reads the task instructions on the Askable Sessions page as they update on screen.
frame_description: A dark screen displaying task instructions for the user to consider while looking at colored labels.

description: User switches from the instructions tab to the 'Smart Filters Mobile App' Figma prototype tab.
frame_description: The browser tab changes to show a Figma prototype of a mobile app listing various sessions.

description: User scrolls down the Figma prototype to view more session cards like 'AI Interview'.
User hovers over the 'Askable Sessions' browser tab, causing a tab preview to appear.
User switches back to the 'Askable Sessions' tab to review the instructions again.
